title: Inferno “fixes”
description: This project was made because the inferno mod uses a variant called the “melanistic alpha” that shows up as a basic light fury so I changed it
body: This project was made because the inferno mod uses a variant called the “melanistic alpha” that shows up as a basic light fury so I changed it. I also found an "albino" variant for the night fury, which is a base IoB variant that wasn't given a change with AA. I decided to make this variant have a unique texture as well. With the new update I have found a "hamfeist" triple stryke variant and made a new texture for that as well
